metadata.name: CoAPthon3-ACME-CSE
metadata.summary: CoAPthon is a python library for the CoAP protocol. This fork of the library provides several updates to support the oneM2M CoAP binding of the ACME oneM2M CSE

classes.name: coapthon.defines.OptionRegistry

methods.name: coapthon.defines.OptionRegistry.get_option_flags
documentation:
Get Critical, UnSafe, NoCacheKey flags from the option number
as per RFC 7252, section 5.4.6

```
param option_num

option number

return

option flags

rtype

3-tuple (critical, unsafe, no-cache)
```
All CoAP options. Every option is represented as: (NUMBER, NAME, VALUE_TYPE, REPEATABLE, DEFAULT)

classes.name: coapthon.defines.Codes
documentation: CoAP codes. Every code is represented as (NUMBER, NAME)

modules.name: coapthon.serializer
documentation: serializer.py
This is a patched version of the CoAPthon serializer.py file.
Original auhtor: Giacomo Tanganelli
Patches by: Andreas Kraft
see https://github.com/Tanganelli/CoAPthon3
Overview about the patches:
- In convert_to_raw(): Corrected a wrong serialization of empty strings. This returned a byte array instead of an empty string.
- Changed some code to use match-case statements

classes.name: coapthon.serializer.Serializer

methods.name: coapthon.serializer.Serializer.deserialize
documentation:
De-serialize a stream of byte to a message.

```
param datagram

the incoming udp message

param source

the source address and port (ip, port)

return

the message

rtype

Message
```

methods.name: coapthon.serializer.Serializer.serialize
documentation:
Serialize a message to a udp packet

```
type message

Message

param message

the message to be serialized

rtype

stream of byte

return

the message serialized
```

documentation:

```
return
```

documentation:

```
return

```

methods.name: coapthon.serializer.Serializer.read_option_value_len_from_byte
documentation:
Calculates the value and length used in the extended option fields.

```
param byte

1-byte option header value.

return

the value and length, calculated from the header including the extended fields.
```

methods.name: coapthon.serializer.Serializer.convert_to_raw
documentation:
Get the value of an option as bytes.

```
param number

the option number

param value

the option value

param length

the option length

return

the value of an option as a BitArray
```

methods.name: coapthon.serializer.Serializer.as_sorted_list
documentation:
Returns all options in a list sorted according to their option numbers.

```
return

the sorted list
```

methods.name: coapthon.serializer.Serializer.get_option_nibble
documentation:
Returns the 4-bit option header value.

```
param optionvalue

the option value (delta or length) to be encoded.

return

the 4-bit option header value.
```

methods.name: coapthon.serializer.Serializer.int_to_words
documentation:
Convert a int value to bytes.

```
param int_val

an arbitrary length Python integer to be split up.
Network byte order is assumed. Raises an IndexError if width of
integer (in bits) exceeds word_size * num_words.

param num_words

number of words expected in return value tuple.

param word_size

size/width of individual words (in bits).

return

a list of fixed width words based on provided parameters.
```
Serializer class to serialize and deserialize CoAP message to/from udp streams.

modules.name: coapthon.client.helperclient
documentation: helperclient.py
This is a patched version of the CoAPthon client/helperclient.py file.
Original auhtor: Giacomo Tanganelli
Patches by: Andreas Kraft
see https://github.com/Tanganelli/CoAPthon3
Overview about the patches:
- Fixed: when receiving a response, the response is put back into the queue if the response is not for the request (.mid attribute)

classes.name: coapthon.client.helperclient.HelperClient

methods.name: coapthon.client.helperclient.HelperClient.__init__
documentation:
Initialize a client to perform request to a server.

```
param server

the remote CoAP server

param sock

if a socket has been created externally, it can be used directly

param cb_ignore_read_exception

Callback function to handle exception raised during the socket read operation

param cb_ignore_write_exception

Callback function to handle exception raised during the socket write operation
```

```
param message

the received message
```

Patches by: Andreas Kraft
see https://github.com/Tanganelli/CoAPthon3

\:param cb_ignore_write_exception: Callback function to handle exception raised during the socket write operation
